phrases.intent_en: Ask if the church is open for visitors now
phrases.text_local: L'église est ouverte aux visiteurs en ce moment ?
phrases.pronunciation: lay-GLEEZ eh too-VAIR oh veez-ee-TUR ahn suh moh-MAHN
phrases.cultural_note: Saint-Maclou may be closed for restoration works periodically.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if photography is allowed inside
phrases.text_local: Est-ce qu'on peut prendre des photos à l'intérieur ?
phrases.pronunciation: ess kohn PUH PRAHN-druh day foh-TOH ah lahn-tay-RYUR
phrases.cultural_note: Photography without flash is generally allowed in French churches.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the church is being restored
phrases.text_local: Est-ce que l'église est en cours de restauration en ce moment ?
phrases.pronunciation: ess kuh lay-GLEEZ eh ahn KOOR duh res-toh-rah-SYOHN ahn suh moh-MAHN
phrases.cultural_note: Saint-Maclou, like many Norman Gothic churches, requires ongoing restoration due to weathering of its intricate stonework. Even with scaffolding, the interior and much of the exterior are usually accessible.

responses.english: Yes, some parts are under restoration.
responses.phonetic: wee sair-TEN par-TEE sohn tahn trah-VOH
responses.french: Oui, certaines parties sont en travaux.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for the best spot to photograph the church
phrases.text_local: D'où recommandez-vous de photographier la façade de l'église ?
phrases.pronunciation: DOO ruh-koh-mahn-DAY-voo duh foh-toh-grah-FYAY lah fah-SAHD duh lay-GLEEZ
phrases.cultural_note: The church stands in a small square at the end of a narrow medieval street. Back up toward the Rue Martainville for the best wide-angle view of the five-porch facade.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about organ concerts in the church
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il des concerts d'orgue dans cette église ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL day kohn-SAIR DOR-guh dahn set ay-GLEEZ
phrases.cultural_note: Saint-Maclou has a fine historic organ and occasionally hosts recitals, particularly during the summer festival season. The tourist office can provide a current programme.

responses.english: You need to check the programme on the website.
responses.phonetic: eel foh vay-ree-FYAY luh proh-GRAM soor luh SEET
responses.french: Il faut vérifier le programme sur le site.
